built: Database: personas text[] column on memories, visual_prompt on personas
API: /api/store accepts personas field, /api/recall filters by persona
UI: Persona filter chips in PalaceExplorer, persona tags on memory cards

decisions: Use personas text[] for flexible multi-persona tagging per memory
Add visual_prompt field for detailed AI image generation descriptions
Scope personas to palace_id for multi-tenancy

next_steps: Phase 2: Dashboard persona breakdown, activity over time charts
Phase 3: Meta-Blogging Agent synthesis endpoint at /api/blog/synthesize
Phase 4: Batch synthesis, scheduled synthesis, advanced analytics
